title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Government of India (GoI) on 14.05.2020 announced PM Street Vendor’s AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi) Scheme for providing affordable loans to street vendors. The Scheme is available to all street vendors engaged in vending in Urban areas as on or before March 24, 2020   
|  The Scheme is available to all street vendors engaged in vending in Urban areas as on or before March 24, 2020.   |  
| --- |  
|  To facilitate working capital loan up to Rs.10,000   |  
 |  
|  Linked to banks Repo Linked Lending Rate (RLLR) and Rating   |

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
